title: Movie Re-Release Calendar 2026: Your Guide to Movies Back In Theaters

blocks.content: We live in a glorious era when we can relive the experience of seeing our favorite films on the big screen, or catch them in theaters for the first time because we missed them (or, in some cases, weren’t even born) when they originally released. Read on to see what movies are getting the re-release treatment this year, and plan accordingly because these tickets often sell out quickly!
Find Something Fresh! Discover What to Watch, Read Reviews, Leave Ratings and Build Watchlists. Download the Rotten Tomatoes App.
